heading: Continuity of operations plans for certain elements of the intelligence community in the case of a national emergency
label: 3316b Continuity of operations plans for certain elements of the intelligence community in the case of a national emergency

children.heading: Definition of covered national emergency
children.label: a Definition of covered national emergency

children.text: A major disaster declared by the President under .section 5170 of title 42
An emergency declared by the President under .section 5191 of title 42
A national emergency declared by the President under the National Emergencies Act ( et seq.).50 U.S.C. 1601
A public health emergency declared under .section 247d of title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: b In general
children.text: The Director of National Intelligence, the Director of the Central Intelligence Agency, the Director of the National Reconnaissance Office, the Director of the Defense Intelligence Agency, the Director of the National Security Agency, and the Director of the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency shall each establish continuity of operations plans for use in the case of covered national emergencies for the element of the intelligence community concerned.

children.heading: Director of National Intelligence and Director of the Central Intelligence Agency
children.label: 1 Director of National Intelligence and Director of the Central Intelligence Agency
children.text: Not later than 7 days after the date on which a covered national emergency is declared, the Director of National Intelligence and the Director of the Central Intelligence Agency shall each submit to the congressional intelligence committees the plan established under subsection (b) for that emergency for the element of the intelligence community concerned.

children.heading: Director of National Reconnaissance Office, Director of Defense Intelligence Agency, Director of National Security Agency, and Director of National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency
children.label: 2 Director of National Reconnaissance Office, Director of Defense Intelligence Agency, Director of National Security Agency, and Director of National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency
B
children.text: The Committee on Armed Services of the Senate.

children.label: C
children.text: The Committee on Armed Services of the House of Representatives.
in accordance with that subsection; and
in a timely manner consistent with .section 3091 of this title
